"'''Vengeance Strike'''" was a short story written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] and was published in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 5]] by [[West End Games]] in [[February]] [[1995]].

==Plot summary==
[[Dirk Harkness]] and [[Jai Raventhorn]] endeavor to destroy the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Vengeance (Golthan)|''Vengeance'']], with aid from [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] and [[Tru'eb Cholakk]].

{{Plot|story}}
